creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Baldwin from comment #1)

Files are owned by root:wheel;  this is done by magic from brooks;  see https://github.com/brooksdavis/zfsowner for a description.

I'll be very happy to have a -<unused letter> option which says "I am root even if I am not root" (or "disable su check").
